register_notice: Append-only. Entries are never deleted or edited in place; corrections are new entries linked via superseded_by.

entries.document_title: ASIC issues early observations on sustainability reporting ahead of 30 June 2026
entries.summary: ASIC published early observations from a desktop review of sustainability reports prepared under Chapter 2M of the Corporations Act 2001, to assist reporting entities ahead of the 30 June 2026 reporting season. Reported as issued in May 2026; exact publication date not yet independently confirmed by direct document capture.
entries.verification_notes: Source URL located and cross-confirmed via two independent search queries returning consistent title and content matching this exact ASIC news item. Direct fetch of the raw document (to compute document_hash) is blocked by this session's sandbox network policy; the GitHub Actions runner for dfapti-hourly.yml has unrestricted internet access and can complete the capture/hash on a future run, or a human can fetch it directly.

proof_of_fact.rationale: Source URL independently corroborated via search cross-reference, but document_hash has not yet been computed from a direct fetch — full Proof of Fact requires that step.

entries.document_title: ASIC guidance on sustainability reporting obligations (Chapter 2M, Corporations Act 2001 / AASB S2)
entries.summary: ASIC's sustainability reporting regulatory resources hub, covering mandatory reporting obligations under Chapter 2M of the Corporations Act 2001 and the Australian Sustainability Reporting Standard AASB S2 Climate-related Disclosures, phased in across three entity groups starting with financial years commencing on or after 1 January 2025.
entries.verification_notes: Source URL located and cross-confirmed via independent search queries returning consistent content describing these obligations. Direct fetch of the raw document (to compute document_hash) is blocked by this session's sandbox network policy; pending capture by the GitHub Actions runner or manual review.

proof_of_fact.rationale: Source URL independently corroborated via search cross-reference, but document_hash has not yet been computed from a direct fetch — full Proof of Fact requires that step.

entries.document_title: ASIC issues early observations on sustainability reporting ahead of 30 June 2026 (259 reports lodged: 34 listed, 225 unlisted)
entries.summary: Per ASIC's early observations release, 259 sustainability reports were lodged for the financial year ending 31 December 2025 (34 from listed entities, 225 from unlisted entities), reviewed for compliance with the Corporations Act and AASB S2.
entries.verification_notes: Same source document as E-001. Source URL located and cross-confirmed via independent search queries returning the exact 259/34/225 figures. Direct fetch of the raw document (to compute document_hash) is blocked by this session's sandbox network policy; pending capture by the GitHub Actions runner or manual review.

proof_of_fact.rationale: Source URL and specific figures independently corroborated via search cross-reference, but document_hash has not yet been computed from a direct fetch — full Proof of Fact requires that step.
